item.title: Less Oil, No Spatter, No Double Frying!
item.description: I'm testing a method of cooking french fries that begins with cold oil, resulting in perfectly cooked fries with no spatter, less oil, AND no double frying. Let's do this!

media:content.media:title: Less Oil, No Spatter, No Double Frying!
media:content.media:description: I'm testing a method of cooking french fries that begins with cold oil, resulting in perfectly cooked fries with no spatter, less oil, AND no double frying. Let's do this!

item.title: Is This Fruit WORTH The $55?
item.description: We test this rare fruit costing $55 to see if it actually delivers on taste, quality, and overall value.

media:content.media:title: Is This Fruit WORTH The $55?
media:content.media:description: We test this rare fruit costing $55 to see if it actually delivers on taste, quality, and overall value.

item.title: Testing Japanese Dollar Store Kitchen Gadgets! 💲
item.description: I got some kitchen gadgets from Daiso, a Japanese ¥100 chain store, and put them to the test!

media:content.media:title: Testing Japanese Dollar Store Kitchen Gadgets! 💲
media:content.media:description: I got some kitchen gadgets from Daiso, a Japanese ¥100 chain store, and put them to the test!

item.title: Making Hoover Stew for a Crowd
item.description: I prepare Hoover Stew, a budget-friendly recipe designed to feed a crowd.

media:content.media:title: Making Hoover Stew for a Crowd
media:content.media:description: I prepare Hoover Stew, a budget-friendly recipe designed to feed a crowd.

item.title: Emmymade Cooks a Giant Emu Egg
item.description: Emmymade prepares a giant emu egg in this food-focused cooking video.

media:content.media:title: Emmymade Cooks a Giant Emu Egg
media:content.media:description: Emmymade prepares a giant emu egg in this food-focused cooking video.

item.title: 4-Ingredient No-Bake Lime Pie
item.description: Sharing a quick no-bake lime cracker pie made with just four ingredients in about 10 minutes.

media:content.media:title: 4-Ingredient No-Bake Lime Pie
media:content.media:description: Sharing a quick no-bake lime cracker pie made with just four ingredients in about 10 minutes.
